identity: A small mechanical turret bot, about half the height of a human. Brass-and-iron body, single glowing amber eye in the center of a dome head, tripod legs, copper piping and rivets, small steam-vents, friendly-but-dangerous silhouette. Steampunk aesthetic.
outfit: Brass-and-iron plating, copper piping, rivets, tiny steam-vents on the back.
weapons: Central amber-eye beam cannon; tripod-stance stability.
attackStyle: East-facing. Muzzle-flash from the central eye, recoil stance on tripod legs.
spellStyle: East-facing. Central eye beaming a charging amber glow, small arcs of electricity around the body.
blockStyle: East-facing. Tripod legs braced wide, dome lowered, armor-plates extended as shield.
koStyle: East-facing, tipped over on its side, tripod legs askew, eye dimmed.
southStyle: Facing camera, idle. Tripod grounded, eye glowing softly.
portraitStyle: Front-facing upper-body bust shot. Dome head with single large amber eye, brass body with rivets, copper piping visible.

referenceSheet.prompt: See generation script — OpenAI gpt-image-2 pipeline, M269.
